comment_content:
Already, this invasion scene reminds us that Mizu is, ironically, _not_ a samurai. She holds no titles, serves no Lord, and lays claim to no righteous path.

Mizu is not a samurai, or a ronin, or a hero. She is a killer. A demon consumed by revenge. She will do whatever it takes to claim her vengeance, even if it means using others as meat shields and tools.

It's tragic, but oh so interesting.

reply_content:
When you're creating a film or a show, it has 3 stages:
Preproduction: writing, storyboarding, animatics, art concepts, creating models, and rigging
Production: animating 
Postproduction: editing, special effects, sound design

Which most likely means they have finished preproduction of season 2 and are moving on to production (generally, preproduction and postproduction take up most of the time)
